title: Ubiquiti UA-Card-B-10 - UniFi Access Card (10pcs)
description: UniFi Access Card is a highly secure NFC ( 13,56 MHz ) smart card compatible with the UniFi Access system. The card data is encrypted with both AES-128 and with UniFi Access proprietary security mechanism. These additional security measures protect the card number from leaks and duplication. The package contains 10 cards of black color ISO/IEC 14443 Type A MIFARE DESFire EV2 UniFi Access Proprietary Security Protocol
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Weight [g] 5 Width [mm] 54 Height [mm] 86 Depth [mm] 1 Color Black
